description_long: This object is a manual toothbrush featuring a natural wood handle and a head with densely packed black bristles. The handle is straight with a gentle ergonomic taper, providing a comfortable grip for the user. The bristle head is rectangular and slightly rounded at the edges, with bristles arranged in uniform rows. The wood grain is visible along the length of the handle, giving it a natural and eco-friendly appearance. There are no visible logos, color accents, or additional design embellishments. The toothbrush appears to be unboxed and is likely intended for personal oral hygiene use.
description: A wooden-handled manual toothbrush with densely packed black bristles and a simple, ergonomic design. The handle shows visible wood grain and the bristle head is rectangular and uniform.
description_view_0: The toothbrush is viewed from the top of the handle, showing the narrow end and the bristle head directly ahead.
description_view_1: A side profile of the toothbrush reveals the full length of the wooden handle and the rectangular bristle head with black bristles.
description_view_2: The toothbrush is seen from the bristle end, highlighting the width of the handle and the compact arrangement of the bristles.
description_view_3: Another side profile, opposite to view 1, again showing the length of the handle and the bristle head.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are arranged in several straight, parallel rows forming a rectangular head. The bristles appear uniform in height and density, with no visible special patterns or multi-level features.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is straight with a gentle ergonomic taper, made of natural wood with visible grain and a smooth, matte finish. There are no additional grip textures or color accents.
